docket_entries.description: AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (H&S 11469 ET SEQ) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $830.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
